working_on.task: Completed Phases 01-05: Double-Tap Edit, Karaoke Sync, Auto-Scroll, E2E Testing
working_on.notes: Full Karaoke system implemented using Spans for high efficiency. Added smart interaction guard (3s delay) for Auto-scroll. Verified build success & test coverage.

pending_tasks.task: Fine-tune scroll animation duration (user might prefer 200ms or 400ms)
Check accessibility labels for the new progress and status texts

recent_changes.description: Phase 01-03: Double-tap, TTS word sync, and Highlight logic implemented.

errors_encountered.error: Missing Robolectric dependency (androidx.test.core) caused unit test failures
errors_encountered.solution: Updated libs.versions.toml and app/build.gradle.kts to include core

decisions_made.reason: Superior to re-setting text or using HTML as it preserves selection/focus and consumes less battery.
Wait for user to stop interaction before resuming auto-scroll prevents UI jumping during active reading.
